notes: Post-fix rerun of Arm B. retrieval_health=ok and qualified_count=4 with non-zero entities returned, consistent with the fix resolving the prior QualificationScorer zero-entity bug. 華棚 (Hua Shuo) unambiguously refers to ASUS (ASUSTeK Computer Inc.), the Taiwan-based multinational computer hardware/electronics company headquartered in Taipei, publicly listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange (TWSE: 2357). Official English name: ASUSTeK Computer Inc., commonly branded as ASUS. Salva correctly surfaced the official asus.com/tw domain (two URL path variants, effectively duplicates) plus two third-party marketplace listings (PChome, Shopee) that reference the ASUS brand but are not ASUS-owned properties. No WebSearch queries were needed -- the ASUS identification is unambiguous and directly confirmed by the official asus.com/tw source URLs returned by Salva.
